zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings於1287年9月29日出生在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼時，他的父親John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings25歲，母親Isabel de Valence23歲。他於大約1320年與Juliana de Leybourne結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1325年1月20日在他的家鄉享年37歲，埋葬在威爾士蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

zh-hans.Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales: 威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼
zh-hans.Allesley, Warwickshire, England: 英国英格兰瓦維其可爾阿利斯利
zh-hans.Woodbridge, Suffolk, England: 英国素福爾可伍德布里奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings于1287年9月29日出生在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼时，他的父亲John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings25岁，母亲Isabel de Valence23岁。他于大约1320年与Juliana de Leybourne结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1325年1月20日在他的家乡享年37岁，埋葬在威尔士蒙姆爾阿加文尼。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hastings,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Hastings (Sussex), near which the English army was defeated by the Normans in 1066. The placename derives from an Old English personal name Hǣsta + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas. In the latter part of the 12th century, at the time of William the Lion, the surname was taken to Scotland, where it assimilated instances of the native Scottish surname Harestane.
English: variant of Hasting with Middle English genitival -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hOistín ‘descendant of Oistín’, the Gaelic form of the personal name Augustine (see Austin ).

variants.name: Hasting
meanings: English: from the Norman personal name Hastang, Hastenc, Hasten (Old Norse Hásteinn ‘high’ + ‘stone’). See also Hastings .

variants.name: Heston
meanings: English: habitational name from Heston (Middlesex) or Histon (Cambridgeshire). The Middlesex placename derives from Old English hǣs ‘brushwood’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, while the Cambridgeshire placename may derive from Old English hyse ‘shoot, tendril’, also ‘son, youth’, + tūn.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings was born on 29 September 1287, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, his father, John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, was 25 and his mother, Isabel de Valence, was 23. He married Juliana de Leybourne about 1320. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 20 January 1325, in his hometown, at the age of 37, and was buried in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings est né le 29 septembre 1287, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Valence, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Juliana de Leybourne environ 1320. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 20 janvier 1325, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings am 29. September 1287 in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings 25 und seine Mutter Isabel de Valence 23. Er hat um 1320 Juliana de Leybourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 20. Januar 1325 im Alter von 37 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings è nato il il 29 settembre 1287 nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, il suo padre, John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Valence, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Juliana de Leybourne circa 1320. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 20 gennaio 1325, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastingsが1287年9月29日にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで生まれた時，父John Hastings 1st Baron Hastingsは25歳，母Isabel de Valenceは23歳であった。約1320年にJuliana de Leybourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1325年1月20日に故郷で37歳で死去し，ウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings(이)가 1287년 9월 29일 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Valence(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1320년 Juliana de Leybourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1325년 1월 20일 그의 고향에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에 묻혔다.

mn.29 September 1287–20 January 1325: 1287 оны Есдүгээр сарын 29–1325 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 20

pt.29 September 1287–20 January 1325: 29 de setembro de 1287–20 de janeiro de 1325
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings nasceu em 29 de setembro de 1287, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Valence, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana de Leybourne aproximadamente 1320. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 20 de janeiro de 1325, em sua cidade natal, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings родился 29 сентября 1287 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Valence, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana de Leybourne около 1320 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 20 января 1325 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс.

es.29 September 1287–20 January 1325: 29 de septiembre de 1287–20 de enero de 1325
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Hastings, 2nd Lord Hastings nació el 29 de septiembre de 1287, en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, John Hastings 1st Baron Hastings, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Isabel de Valence, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Juliana de Leybourne aproximadamente 1320. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 20 de enero de 1325, en su pueblo, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales.
